arts.ttl: How to Watch Real Madrid vs. Real Sociedad: Copa del Rey Semifinals
arts.sum: Real Madrid have a one goal lead on aggregate heading into the second leg at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti reveals Kylian Mbappe "legend" wish as Real Madrid boss makes Cristiano Ronaldo comparison
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti reveals his wish for Kylian Mbappe to become a "legend" like Cristiano Ronaldo at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Concerns surround Real Madrid at key point in season
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is weighing the option of playing David Alaba against Real Sociedad in the second leg of the Copa del Rey semi-final, partnering him with Asensio in central defence. Ancelotti’s likely starting XI: Lunin; Valverde, Asensio, Alaba, Fran García; Tchouaméni, Camavinga; Rodrygo, Bellingham, Vinicius; Mbappé.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Madrid welcome Real Sociedad for the second leg of their semi-final, with Endrick's winner in San Sebastian meaning they've got a lead to preserve at the start of a hectic April. The Frenchman has a chance of returning for Madrid's Champions League quarter-final with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Real Sociedad: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid are aiming to return to the Copa del Rey final when they face Real Sociedad in the second leg of their semi-final tie. They enter the second leg having exited the Europa League before the international break, but a victory over Real Valladolid at the weekend saw them climb up to tenth in La Liga.

arts.ttl: 'I've told him': Ruben Amorim reveals clear Manchester United transfer message over Bruno Fernandes
arts.sum: Red Devils skipper has been linked with a big-money summer switch to Real Madrid in recent days

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Man United's Bruno Fernandes transfer stance amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim insists Bruno Fernandes will not leave Old Trafford despite speculation linking him with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Has Kylian Mbappé’s goal for Real Madrid vs Leganés been classed as a free-kick?
arts.sum: One of football’s leading statisticians have weighed in on the debate surrounding the latest goal netted by Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé. Frontman Mbappé was for his part of course…

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta tips Bukayo Saka to make instant Arsenal impact in warning to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka will make his long-awaited return for Arsenal on Tuesday night and it could be with a start against Fulham, as Mikel Arteta insists that he's 'ready to go'

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives telling Bruno Fernandes update amid Real Madrid transfer link
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim insists Bruno Fernandes will not be leaving Old Trafford this summer despite reports of interest from Real Madrid
